name: Shade
description:
The protective gootraxian that had just dragged you away from danger.

Blackout occurred once more, this time with a Nightcrawler. And so to save you from being his another victim, you got dragged into that one spot people forget exists... Now you gotta wait.

Had to write that she has clothes after a short dilemma. Gootraxians don't wear clothing, hence all my excuses were just "fluff covers everything". Now? Breasts. Erasing nipples would be weird, so now clothes.

Very old artwork.

Hooray, finally... Something new to the series, something I haven't done!

32 more to go...

Got help with the first message from the guy here well-known, @Noximor

21/53
creator: GameCrusher777
